# HOCA Reference Fixtures

These fixtures are sanitized HEPA parity inputs derived from the read-only HOCA
contract shapes. They intentionally use placeholder paths and generic project
IDs so they can be committed safely.

Reference classes:

- `HocaTaskSpec`
- `HocaFleetTask`
- `HocaLane`
- `HocaReviewReport`
- `HocaMergeReadiness`
- HOCA public-evidence redaction behavior
